patterns.title: I'd be grateful if you can/could ____
patterns.translation: 如果你能……，我会感激不尽

examples.en: I'd be grateful if you can drive me to the airport.

examples.en: I'd be grateful if you can teach me English.

examples.en: I'd be grateful if you can give me a job.

examples.en: I'd be grateful if you could recommend me a good movie.

examples.en: You have to study hard in order to pass your exam.
examples.zh: 为了通过考试 你必须努力学习

examples.en: You have to save money in order to buy a house.
examples.zh: 为了买房 你必须存钱

examples.en: You have to be patient in order to achieve your goals.
examples.zh: 为了完成你的目标 你必须耐心

examples.en: You have to practice more in order to improve your skill.
examples.zh: 为了提升你的技术 你必须训练的更多

examples.en: You have to learn from your mistakes in order to grow.
examples.zh: 为了成长 你必须从你的错误中学习

examples.en: You have to believe in yourself in order to be happy.
examples.zh: 为了快乐 你必须相信自己

examples.en: You’re supposed to wait for me.
You’re supposed to trust me.
You’re supposed to help.
You’re supposed to be here.
You’re supposed to follow the rules.
You’re supposed to say, "thank you".
You’re supposed to turn off your phone.
You’re supposed to wear a mask.
You’re supposed to follow me.
You’re supposed to take your shoes off.
You’re supposed to wash your hands.
You’d better help.
You’d better listen.
You’d better hurry.
You better wear a jacket.
You better apologize to me.
You better save some money.
You better study hard.
You better check the expiration date.
examples.zh: 你最好检查一下过期日期

examples.en: You better get some rest.
You better be careful.

patterns.title: If I were you, I would ____
patterns.translation: 如果我是你的话 我会……

examples.en: If I were you, I would go to college.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话 我会去上大学

examples.en: If I were you, I would take a break.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话 我会休息一下

examples.en: If I were you, I would save some money.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话 我会存一些钱

examples.en: If I were you, I would marry her.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话 我会娶她

examples.en: If I were you, I would apologize to her.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话 我会跟她道歉

examples.en: If I were you, I would take my time.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话，我会不着急 慢慢来

examples.en: If I were you, I would learn English.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话，我会学英语

examples.en: If I were you, I would forgive them.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话 我会原谅他们

examples.en: If I were you, I would spend more time with my parents.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话 我会多花时间陪陪父母

examples.en: If I were you, I would read more books.
examples.zh: 如果我是你的话 我会多看书
